---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
###############################################################################
##  Legible cnet-plots – full suite (GO / KEGG / Reactome + neural subset)   ##
##  + optional 3-D interactive GO network                                    ##
##  Needs:  output/enrichment_objects.rds  (from your main notebook)         ##
###############################################################################

## ---- 1  •  packages --------------------------------------------------------
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(enrichplot)   # cnetplot()
  library(igraph)
  library(ggraph)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(plotly)
  library(dplyr)
  library(htmlwidgets)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(openxlsx) 
})

## little logger --------------------------------------------------------------
log_msg <- function(...) message("[cnet-plots] ", ...)

## ---- 2  •  load enrichment -------------------------------------------------
obj     <- readRDS("enrichment_objects.rds")
ego     <- obj$ego
ekegg   <- obj$ekegg
ereact  <- obj$ereact
fc_vec  <- obj$fc_vec              # named logFC

outdir  <- "output/cnetplots"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## ---- 3  •  helper: decluttered cnet-plot -----------------------------------
make_cnet <- function(enrich_obj,
                      title,                   # give every plot an explicit title
                      top_terms  = 8,
                      min_genes  = 3,
                      gene_cex   = 0.8,
                      term_cex   = 1.2,
                      layout_alg = "fr") {

  if (is.null(enrich_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrich_obj)) == 0) {
    log_msg("‘", title, "’ – enrichment object is empty; skipping.")
    return(NULL)
  }

  pass_ids <- as.data.frame(enrich_obj) |>
              filter(Count >= min_genes) |>
              slice_head(n = top_terms) |>
              pull(ID)

  if (length(pass_ids) == 0) {                  # ← NEW GUARD
    log_msg("‘", title, "’ – no terms passed (min_genes = ", min_genes, "); skipping.")
    return(NULL)
  }

  trimmed <- enrich_obj
  trimmed@result <- trimmed@result[trimmed@result$ID %in% pass_ids, , drop = FALSE]

  p_base <- tryCatch(
    cnetplot(trimmed,
             foldChange         = fc_vec,
             showCategory       = length(pass_ids),
             circular           = FALSE,
             node_label         = "all",
             layout             = layout_alg,
             cex_label_category = term_cex,
             cex_label_gene     = gene_cex),
    error = function(e) {                       # ← NEW GUARD
      log_msg("cnetplot failed for ‘", title, "’: ", e$message)
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
  if (is.null(p_base)) return(NULL)

  ig <- attr(p_base, "igraph");  if (is.null(ig)) ig <- attr(p_base, "graph")

  ## embellish + repel labels
  p <- p_base +
       ggtitle(title) +
       theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14))

  node_df <- p$data
  flag <- c("category", "isCategory", "type")[c("category","isCategory","type") %in% names(node_df)][1]
  if (!is.null(flag)) {
    cat_nodes <- node_df[node_df[[flag]], , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(cat_nodes) > 0)
      p <- p + geom_text_repel(data  = cat_nodes,
                               aes(label = name),
                               size = term_cex * 3,
                               box.padding = 0.4,
                               segment.alpha = 0.3,
                               seed = 1991)
  }

  attr(p, "igraph") <- ig    # restore for 3-D step
  p
}

## ---- 4  •  derive neural GO subset -----------------------------------------
neural_kw <- c("neuro", "synap", "axon", "dendrit", "neur", "brain", "nerv",
               "glia", "myelin", "schwann", "spine", "plasticity", "cerebral",
               "cerebell", "cortex", "spinal", "ganglia", "astrocyte",
               "oligodendro", "hippocamp", "amygdala")

pick_neural_ids <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(character(0))
  df[grepl(paste(neural_kw, collapse = "|"), df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), "ID", drop = TRUE]
}

neural_ids <- pick_neural_ids(as.data.frame(ego))
neural_ego <- NULL
if (length(neural_ids) >= 2) {          # need ≥2 terms for a useful network
  neural_ego        <- ego
  neural_ego@result <- dplyr::filter(ego@result, ID %in% neural_ids)
}

## ---- 5  •  build plots list -------------------------------------------------
plots <- list(
  GO_ORA       = make_cnet(ego,         "GO BP ORA – decluttered"),
  KEGG_ORA     = make_cnet(ekegg,       "KEGG ORA – decluttered"),
  Reactome_ORA = make_cnet(ereact,      "Reactome ORA – decluttered"),
  Neural_GO    = make_cnet(neural_ego,  "Neural GO BP ORA – decluttered")
)

## ---- 6  •  multi-page PDF --------------------------------------------------
pdf(file.path(outdir, "cnetplots_decluttered.pdf"), 10, 8)
for (nm in names(plots))
  if (!is.null(plots[[nm]])) print(plots[[nm]])
dev.off()
log_msg("✓ combined PDF → ", file.path(outdir, "cnetplots_decluttered.pdf"))

## ---- 7  •  per-plot PDF & PNG ---------------------------------------------
for (nm in names(plots)) {
  pl <- plots[[nm]];  if (is.null(pl)) next
  base <- file.path(outdir, paste0(nm, "_cnet_2D"))
  ggsave(paste0(base, ".pdf"), pl, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in")
  ggsave(paste0(base, ".png"), pl, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
}
log_msg("✓ individual 2-D PDFs/PNGs written")

## ---- 8  •  optional 3-D for GO network ------------------------------------
if (!is.null(plots$GO_ORA)) {

  get_graph <- function(gplot, enrich_obj) {
    g <- attr(gplot, "igraph");  if (is.null(g)) g <- attr(gplot, "graph")
    if (is.null(g)) {
      log_msg("igraph missing – rebuilding minimal graph")
      tmp <- cnetplot(enrich_obj, foldChange = fc_vec, showCategory = 8)
      g   <- attr(tmp, "igraph"); if (is.null(g)) g <- attr(tmp, "graph")
    }
    g
  }

  ig <- get_graph(plots$GO_ORA, ego)

  if (is.null(ig)) {
    warning("Couldn’t obtain an igraph → skipping 3-D GO network.")
  } else {
    set.seed(123)
    xy <- layout_with_fr(ig); coords <- cbind(xy, z = 0)
    V(ig)$x <- coords[,1]; V(ig)$y <- coords[,2]; V(ig)$z <- coords[,3]

    ed <- as_data_frame(ig, "edges")
    edge_coords <- data.frame(
      x = c(V(ig)$x[ed$from], V(ig)$x[ed$to], NA),
      y = c(V(ig)$y[ed$from], V(ig)$y[ed$to], NA),
      z = c(V(ig)$z[ed$from], V(ig)$z[ed$to], NA)
    )

    p3d <- plot_ly(type = "scatter3d", mode = "lines",
                   x = edge_coords$x, y = edge_coords$y, z = edge_coords$z,
                   line = list(width = 1, color = "#AAAAAA"),
                   hoverinfo = "none") %>%
           add_markers(x = V(ig)$x, y = V(ig)$y, z = V(ig)$z,
                        text = V(ig)$name,
                        hoverinfo = "text",
                        marker = list(size  = ifelse(V(ig)$category, 8, 4),
                                      color = ifelse(V(ig)$category,
                                                     "#e24a33", "#348abd"))) %>%
           layout(title = "GO ORA cnet-plot (interactive 3-D)",
                  scene  = list(xaxis = list(title = ""),
                                yaxis = list(title = ""),
                                zaxis = list(title = "")))

    html_file <- file.path(outdir, "cnet_GO_ORA_3D.html")
    saveWidget(p3d, html_file, selfcontained = TRUE)
    log_msg("✓ interactive 3-D GO network → ", html_file)
  }
}

## ---- 8a  •  export source tables -------------------------------------------
wb_sheets <- list()

for (nm in names(plots)) {
  pl <- plots[[nm]]
  if (is.null(pl)) next

  ## pull the trimmed enrichment result stored inside the plot’s igraph attr
  enrich_obj <- switch(nm,
                       GO_ORA       = ego,
                       KEGG_ORA     = ekegg,
                       Reactome_ORA = ereact,
                       Neural_GO    = neural_ego)

  if (is.null(enrich_obj)) next

  # replicate the “pass_ids” filtering used in make_cnet()
  top_df <- as.data.frame(enrich_obj) |>
            filter(Count >= 3) |>
            slice_head(n = 8)             # same defaults as make_cnet()

  # keep only the usual columns plus adjusted P
  keep <- intersect(c("ID","Description","GeneRatio","Count",
                      "pvalue","p.adjust","NES","setSize"), names(top_df))
  wb_sheets[[nm]] <- top_df[, keep]
}

if (length(wb_sheets)) {
  out_xlsx <- file.path(outdir, "cnetplot_sources.xlsx")
  write.xlsx(wb_sheets, out_xlsx, overwrite = TRUE)
  log_msg("✓ per-plot source tables → ", out_xlsx)
} else {
  warning("No source tables generated – all enrichment objects were empty?")
}

log_msg("✓ all done – see ‘", outdir, "’ for plots")


```
